label: Basics 1 — Words, Feelings, and the Table
description: Words, feelings and the everyday table — the germinating seed of meaning. Vocabulary (WordNet), emotion & sense, kinship/love bonds, and everyday food so concepts like love and apple grow richly. Loads first; quick-start & cookbook-0 run on this alone.
